item.title: Siegfried & Joy

They're also outspoken antifascists and hate the afd, which makes them regular dudes in my book.

I’m bisexual which means I’m attracted to men who are attracted to me and I don’t want to be attracted to men that are attracted to me. Wut?
My cuddle pug

item.title: What Happened Today #30
item.description: Even Sundays aren't exempt from shakeups. The US stopped cyberops against Russia, sidelined a senior USAID voice warning that aid cuts cost lives, and ordered agencies to sidestep environmental and transparency laws. Military aid and crypto moves added fuel to today's chaos. Review & share with your people. #resist #GovBriefToday Your links are below. 1 - https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/defense-secretary-pete-hegseth-orders-halt-offensive-cyber-operations-rcna194435 2 - https://www.spokesman.com/stories/2025/mar/02/senior-usaid-official-ousted-after-detailing-probl/ 3 - https://www.reuters.com/world/rubio-signs-declaration-expedite-delivery-4-billion-military-aid-israel-2025-03-02/ 4 - https://www.cbsnews.com/news/scott-bessent-treasury-secretary-ukraine-economic-deal-face-the-nation/ 5 - https://apnews.com/article/trudeau-canada-king-charles-trump-5140e841c40e394bba21c2619534aa7c 6 - https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/02/trump-announces-strategic-crypto-reserve-including-bitcoin-solana-xrp-and-more.html 7 - https://www.straitstimes.com/world/now-its-log-baby-log-as-trump-eyes-us-national-forests 8 - https://home.treasury.gov/news/press-releases/sb0038 9 - https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/02/johnson-stopgap-funding-bill-doge-cuts-00206881 Fighting Back - https://techcrunch.com/2025/03/01/mark-cuban-offers-to-fund-government-tech-unit-that-was-cut-in-the-middle-of-the-night/?g Archive - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Instagram is actively protecting overtly racist comments
item.description: Yet they shadow-ban anyone who speaks about the ongoing Palestinian genocide. If nothing is done we'll see lynchings do a comeback in our lifetime. FUCK META, FUCK GOOGLE, FUCK X, FUCK MICROSOFT and all the lame tech bros who think they are above us!

item.title: ‘Go Ski in Russia’ – US Protesters Send Vance Into Hiding During Vacation - Leaves Vermont in a Hurry.
item.description: Lining the streets of his motorcade route, gathered in front of his picturesque inn, and draped in Ukrainian flags as they skied down the slopes of the Sugarbush Resort, more than 1,000 protesters in Vermont. Vance had planned to have a quiet ski weekend with his family at the cozy Pitcher Inn near the slopes of Sugarbush, but he ended up being moved to an “undisclosed location” in the area instead, the New York Post reported. One of the protesters, Tekla Van Hoven from nearby Waterbury, told a Vermont TV station, “Ski Russia, because JD Vance has no friends in Vermont, but he’s got lots of friends in Russia, so he should go there for vacation.” Trump and Vance earned less than one-third of the votes in Vermont in the 2024 elections, their worst defeat in any state. (Only the District of Columbia rendered more embarrassing results for them, where they carried only 6.5 percent of the vote.) So, the cost of this vacation caravan, the same as every fire fired National Forest Park Ranger? https://www.kyivpost.com/post/48140
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: dump, from an ass
item.description:
maybe a little ranch too
this seems chill
look up the story behind this song, its strange
this had no business making me laugh as much as it did
HOLD ME NOW
*pfffffftttttt*
well, more than a mile
I know that's right
gonna get a big dish of beef chow mein
this and a glass of milk
my fat boy loves balloons. have a good week
